name_cn:
265bag mini
The mini size makes the 25bag more exquisite! The hobo's inherent lazy, relaxed vibe; don't let the name 'mini' fool you, the practicality is a pleasant surprise! Easily fits keys and other daily essentials, the side flap pocket is handy for transit cards, and the opening is super convenient. Even for 160cm petite frames, it doesn't look bulky; the shoulder carry hits right at the waistline, perfect for proportions. Jennie looks amazing in it, vintage and casual, pairing with a 🧥 makes for effortlessly stylish looks!
Size: 20*22*12.5cm
No.: 5631 mini Blue Denim
